label: Anthropic
description: Connect to Anthropic's Claude models for text generation, chat, and reasoning tasks.

form.title: Connect Anthropic
form.subtitle: Paste your Anthropic API key to give Anton access to Claude models.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from the Anthropic Console. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth setup, no extra config.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Anthropic API key

1. Open [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com) and sign in.
2. Click **API Keys** in the left sidebar.
3. Click **Create Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Create Key**.
4. Copy the key — it starts with `sk-ant-` and is shown **only once**. If you lose it, you'll need to create a new one.
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- Optionally select a default model below; you can override it per-request inside Anton.
- API usage is billed to your Anthropic account. Set spend limits in the Console under **Settings → Limits** to avoid surprises.
- To revoke access, return to **API Keys** in the Console and delete the key.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in console.anthropic.com → API Keys. Shown only once — copy it before closing the dialog.

fields.name: default_model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The Claude model Anton uses by default. Can be overridden per-request.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you're routing through a proxy or using a custom endpoint. Leave blank for the default Anthropic API.
